member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.DomainException
member.summary: Domain Exception.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.DomainException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.DomainException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Message.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.DomainException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception, or a null reference if no inner exception is specified.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IAppLogger`1
member.summary: This type eliminates the need to depend directly on the ASP.NET Core logging types.
member.typeparam: The type who's name is used for the logger category name.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IAppLogger`1.LogInformation(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Formats and writes an informational log message.
member.param: Format string of the log message in message template format. Example: "User {User} logged in from {Address}".
An object array that contains zero or more objects to format.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IAppLogger`1.LogWarning(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Formats and writes a warning log message.
member.param: Format string of the log message in message template format. Example: "User {User} logged in from {Address}".
An object array that contains zero or more objects to format.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IAppLogger`1.LogError(System.Exception,System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Formats and writes a error log message.
member.param: Exception captured.
Format string of the log message in message template format. Example: "User {User} logged in from {Address}".
An object array that contains zero or more objects to format.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IAppLogger`1.LogDebug(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Formats and writes a debug log message.
member.param: Format string of the log message in message template format. Example: "User {User} logged in from {Address}".
An object array that contains zero or more objects to format.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IAuthorizationService
member.summary: Checks policy based permissions for a user.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IAuthorizationService.Authorize(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal,System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a user meets a specific authorization policy.
member.param: The user to check the policy against.
An optional resource the policy should be checked with. If a resource is not required for policy evaluation you may pass null as the value.
The name of the policy to check against a specific context.
member.returns: Indicates whether the user, and optional resource has fulfilled the policy. True when the policy has been fulfilled otherwise false.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IBus
member.summary: Bus API.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IBus.Send(System.Object)
member.summary: Sends a message on the queue/topic associated to this client.
member.param: Message.
member.returns: A task to be resolved on when the operation has completed.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IBusFactory
member.summary: Bus Factory.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IBusFactory.GetClient(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets a bus client for an event type.
member.param: Event type.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.ITelemetry
member.summary: Send events, metrics and other telemetry.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.ITelemetry.TrackEvent(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Double})
member.summary: User actions and other events. Used to track user behavior or to monitor performance. Insert TrackEvent calls in your code to count various events. How often users choose a particular feature, how often they achieve particular goals, or maybe how often they make particular types of mistakes.
member.param: A name for the event. Max length 150.
Named string values you can use to search and filter events.
Numeric measurements associated with this event.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.ITelemetry.TrackMetric(System.String,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Performance measurements such as queue lengths not related to specific events. For get chart metrics that are not attached to particular events. For example, you could monitor a queue length at regular intervals. With metrics, the individual measurements are of less interest than the variations and trends, and so statistical charts are useful.
member.param: The name of the metric. Max length 150.
he value of the metric. Sum if based on more than one sample count.
Named string values you can use to search and classify trace messages.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork
member.summary: Unit Of Work. Should only be used by Use Cases.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork.Save
member.summary: Applies all database changes.
